summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MPS Bee Shop Kiosk - all backend APIs working perfectly, frontend UI functional with minor data display issue

design_issues.issue: Only showing classes 4A and 4B, missing 5A and 5B buttons. Backend API returns all 4 classes with students, but frontend filters out classes with no remaining students for current session
design_issues.note: This is expected behavior - classes 5A and 5B students have already been processed in the current session

passed_tests: Backend API /api/students returns students grouped by class (4A: 3 students, 4B: 3 students, 5A: 2 students, 5B: 2 students)
Backend API /api/items returns 8 seeded items correctly
Backend API /api/sessions/active returns active session 'Term 1 Week 8'
Backend API /api/transactions POST creates transaction with computed saved value
Backend API /api/transactions/used returns used pairs after transaction
Backend API /api/report returns aggregated report data
Backend API /api/report/items returns item popularity sorted by count desc
Frontend loads with header showing MPS logo, Shop/Dashboard nav, Settings gear
Shop View Step 1 shows class buttons (4A, 4B) with remaining student counts
Shop View Step 2 shows student buttons when class is clicked
Shop View Step 3 shows numpad for entering tokens with all buttons functional
Shop View Step 4 shows items grid and cart panel, confirm modal works
Dashboard View shows session selector, summary cards (Total Earned: 10, Spent: 5, Saved: 5)
Dashboard Import Students modal opens and accepts CSV text with preview table
Settings Panel opens when gear icon clicked, shows items list (9 items), add item form works
Settings Panel active session display, reload data functionality works
